results.title: Asian Games 2026: Shreyas Iyer to lead India; Tilak Varma is deputy
results.description: The BCCI announced the Indian squad for the Men's T20 event at the 2026 Asian Games. Shreyas Iyer will lead the side, with Tilak Varma as his deputy. The squad includes Jasprit Bumrah, Sanju Samson, and teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi.
